# engine

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata audio engine: schedules the Score's notes against the Web Audio clock on play, with an instrument picker, master volume, and load status.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.Section` "Audio" → `AudioPanel`
